title: Highway Resort
desc: A bride-to-be is abducted for ransom just before her wedding. During captivity, she forms an uneasy bond with her kidnapper, testing loyalties, love, and safety.

title: Apna Sapna Money Money
desc: Satyabol, a devout Hindu, opposes his daughter Shivani's relationship with Arjun, a Christian. Arjun turns to his cunning cousin, Kishan, to help unite him with Shivani despite the obstacles.

desc: Crime Stories uncovers real-life investigations, revealing shocking crimes, suspects, and twists as detectives chase truth and justice through evidence, interviews, and hidden motives.

desc: After don Yugandhar is killed in a police encounter, Superintendent Jaganath trains his lookalike to impersonate him and take down his gang.
